title: The Great Escape Adventure
article_text: Firstly, I felt anxious about our adventure to the old castle. We found an ancient printer in a dusty room, which was a surprising attraction. The veteran guide told us not to hurry and to quietly explore every cluster of rooms. My nerve failed when I saw a fence blocking the path to the ocean. We had to exhaust all our determination to climb over it. The reflection of the moon on the water gave us a moment of peace. Altogether, the trip was a mix of confusion and wonder. It is the fiction that we read that made this place seem magical. A carpet of green moss covered the ground near the castle walls. The implementation of our plan required careful thought, but the complexity was worth it.

sentences.en: Firstly, I felt anxious about our adventure to the old castle.
sentences.zh: 首先，我对去旧城堡的冒险感到焦虑。

words.eng_def: a large strong building from the past

sentences.en: We found an ancient printer in a dusty room, which was a surprising attraction.
sentences.zh: 我们在一个布满灰尘的房间里发现了一台古老的打印机，这是一个令人惊讶的景点。

words.eng_def: a machine that prints words or pictures on paper
something interesting or pleasing that people want to see

sentences.en: The veteran guide told us not to hurry and to quietly explore every cluster of rooms.
sentences.zh: 老练的导游告诉我们不要着急，要安静地探索每一组房间。

words.eng_def: in a way that makes little noise
a group of similar things close together

sentences.en: My nerve failed when I saw a fence blocking the path to the ocean.
sentences.zh: 当我看到一道栅栏挡住了通往海洋的路时，我失去了勇气。

words.eng_def: the ability to stay calm and brave
a structure that divides or protects an area
the large area of salt water that covers most of the earth

sentences.en: We had to exhaust all our determination to climb over it.
sentences.zh: 我们不得不耗尽所有的决心才能爬过去。

words.eng_def: the quality of trying very hard to do something

sentences.en: The reflection of the moon on the water gave us a moment of peace.
sentences.zh: 月亮在水面上的倒影给了我们片刻的宁静。

words.eng_def: an image seen in a mirror or on a surface

sentences.en: Altogether, the trip was a mix of confusion and wonder.
sentences.zh: 总的来说，这次旅行混合了困惑和惊奇。

words.eng_def: a state of not understanding something

sentences.en: It is the fiction that we read that made this place seem magical.
sentences.zh: 正是我们读过的那些虚构故事让这个地方显得神奇。

words.eng_def: stories that are not true or real

sentences.en: A carpet of green moss covered the ground near the castle walls.
sentences.zh: 一层绿色的苔藓像地毯一样覆盖了城堡墙壁附近的地面。

sentences.en: The implementation of our plan required careful thought, but the complexity was worth it.
sentences.zh: 我们计划的实施需要仔细思考，但这种复杂性是值得的。

words.eng_def: the act of putting a plan into action

quiz.question_cn: 以下哪个词的意思是'焦虑的'？

quiz.question_en: What is the Chinese translation of 'fence'?

image_prompts: An old castle on a hill, with a person standing in front looking nervous.
A dusty room inside the castle with an ancient printer on a wooden table.
An experienced guide pointing to a cluster of rooms, with two people listening quietly.
A wooden fence blocking a path that leads to the ocean, with a person looking scared.
Two people climbing over a fence with determined expressions.
A calm ocean at night with the moon's reflection on the water.
A confused person standing in a strange place with many paths.
A person holding a book of fiction, with a magical castle in the background.
Green moss covering the ground like a carpet near castle walls.
Two people studying a map with thoughtful expressions, planning their next step.
